models.title: Jones Stephens 1-1/4in. x 18in. Stainless Steel Grab Bar With Concealed Snap-On Flange
source_fields:
1 1/4X18 STN GRAB BAR W/ FLNGE

  • 18 gauge stainless steel
  • Meets 900 lb. downward pull when installed properly
  • Meets federal specification WW-P-541/8B, Amendment 1, 16 April 1990
  • Meets ANSI 117.1 and all ADA Code requirements
  • Meets federal specifications for FHA, VA hospital, private construction
  • Individually bagged with stainless steel mounting screws

source_fields: 24 inches in length; Brushed nickel finish; Made of durable stainless steel; 250 lb. weight capacity; Concealed mounting screws; Sleek design; Designed for secure installation; Provides added stability; Not suitable for mounting on hollow surfaces; Requires wood or steel backing material; Increases bathroom safety; Model: RMX-GB24-BN; Brand: Randolph Morris; Solid brass or stainless steel construction for durability; Weight-rated for safe, reliable support; Meets ADA guidelines for grab bar installation; Premium finish resists tarnishing and corrosion; Easy to install with included mounting hardware; Eligible for Free Shipping on orders $99+; Important: Item must be inspected within 48 hours of receipt

models.title: Salus Grab Bar
source_fields: Bathroom Grab Bar; ADA Approved; Includes flanges and set screws, wall anchors and mounting screws; Stainless steel construction ensures durability and reliability; Premium finish resists tarnishing and corrosion; Designed for Bathrooms and Showers; Choose from a variety of finishes like chrome and matte black; Expertly crafted for long-lasting durability; Easy-to-install design suitable for DIY and professionals; Low-maintenance and a breeze to keep clean; Luxurious, modern design; Suitable for both residential and commercial use; Perfect balance of style, functionality, and durability in one design; Provides stability and balance for those with accessibility needs; Maximum support means minimal assistance in the bathroom; Enjoy the reassurance of ADA-compliance; Eligible for Free Shipping on orders $99+; Important: Item must be inspected within 48 hours of receipt
